{{Quote|Yes, he's the one Borvo sold all those illegal weapons to. Now he's ready to testify and spend his life free on the beaches of Corellia. Good deal for him, yeah?|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Thale Dustrunner|Dustrunner]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BC" />}}
'''Aldalad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|Male]] criminal who lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Well, now you're going to have to go get Aldalad. He's ready to testify against Borvo and his crew. Bring him back safely.|Captain Dustrunner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BC" />}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Aldalad bought a large amount of illegal weapons to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Borvo]]. However, he was arrested by the [[Corellian Security Force]] whose members were investigating Borvo's activities on Corellia. Aldalad therefore agreed to testify against Borvo, in exchange for CorSec protection and retirement on the beaches of Corellia.<ref name="SWG:BC" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> the CorSec investigation against Borvo the Hutt came to an end when a spacer working for Borvo murdered the infiltrated CorSec agent [[Niksel Frangee]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. As nobody in the CorSec knew how Frangee looked like at the moment of his death, the spacer used Frangee's CorSec badge to pass himself off as Frangee on Corellia.<ref name="SWG:BGATTC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Borvo's Guard - A Trip To Corellia|Naboo}}</ref> Aldalad was going to testify when CorSec [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Thale Dustrunner]] gave his secret location to Borvo's spy. Aldalad was killed by the spacer working for Borvo, by pretending to be a subordinate of Captain Dustrunner.<ref name="SWG:BC" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|thumb|250px|Possible depictions of Aldalad]]
Aldalad appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Because Aldalad spawned under the generic "borvo_aldalad" template, his appearance was randomized under one of thirty-five possible depictions. However, quest dialogues identified him as male.<ref name="SWG:BC" />

Aldalad was present in the original release of the game, being part of [[W:c:swg:Borvo the Hutt questline (pre-NGE)|Borvo the Hutt's questline]].<ref name="SWG:TD">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Thale Dustrunner|Corellia}}</ref> With the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]],<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> Borvo the Hutt's questline was [[W:c:swg:Borvo the Hutt questline|revamped]]. While the gameplay of the questline was extensively upgraded, the storyline remained similar. Players had to kill Aldalad in a quest where they were working for Borvo the Hutt.<ref name="SWG:BGATTC" />
